ChangeRequest.name: Update Domains related to the Economic Activity and Institutional Sector
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!-- See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab) -->
### Overview The Domains associated with the Economic Activity and the Institutional Sector contain more allowed values than the most granular ones.
For example, under the "Institutional Sectors" Domain, we have, among others, the following allowed values: - (S14) Households - (S14_B) Households other than sole proprietorships/partnerships without legal status - (S14_A) Households that are sole proprietorships/partnerships without legal status
Under the NACE Domain, we have, among others, the following allowed values: - (01_4) Animal production - (01_44) Raising of camels and camelids - (01_41) Raising of dairy cattle - (01_43) Raising of horses and other equines
### Contact person @Maria_Manuel.Henriques
### Description of change request - [ ] Change the Domain "Institutional Sectors" to only include the most granular allowed values. - [ ] Change the Domain "NACE levels 2 to 4 plus not applicable (stating)" to only include the most granular allowed values.
### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes - "Institutional Sectors" Domain - "NACE levels 2 to 4 plus not applicable (stating)" Domain
### Forward Engineering considerations Not applicable
### Before closing checklist - [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Any other actions to be taken
